prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab
instance Axis1PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component, DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "First axis motor driven by permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Axis1CycloidalGearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Component, DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear transmission following the permanent magnet synchronous motor in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [

    base:contains Axis1PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Axis1CycloidalGearTransmission
]

instance MQTTDataFlow : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Automated one-way data flow from physical to virtual using MQTT protocol",

]

instance PhysicalSystemStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "State measurements from physical system, transmitted via one-way data flow",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTDataFlow,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML, ACME, AADL, MontiArc, SysMLIBD, RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT, MontiArcAutomaton, SysMLStateMachinesV17, Simulink, CPlusPlus, Java
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]
